# Interface: DatabasePort

Defined in: [core/ports/database.port.ts:5](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/ports/database.port.ts#L5)

Abstract database interface for specification runners.
Implement this to plug in your database stack (e.g. Postgres, SQLite).
